properties.remark: TOUCHDOWN REPORTED FROM NEAR 78TH AND FRUIT VALLEY ROAD.
TORNADO PRODUCED DAMAGE TO THE SIDING AND AWNINGS ON 24 MOBILE HOMES. ONE MOBILE HOME RECEIVED SIGNIFICANT DAMAGE FROM FALLEN TREE.
TOUCHDOWN REPORTED FROM NEAR 78TH
THUNDERSTORM PRODUCED HAIL SEVERAL INCHES DEEP IN THE 2800 BLOCK OF NW 93RD STREET IN HAZEL DELL.
TORNADO PRODUCED WIND DAMAGE TO 60 TO 80 STRUCTURES.

TORNADO WITH PRELIMINARY RATING OF EF1 ON THE ENHANCED FUJITA SCALE WITH ESTIMATED WINDS OF 90 TO 110 MPH. TORNADO PATH LENGTH WAS APPROX. 2 MILES LONG AND 1/4 MILE WIDE...EXTENDING FROM VANCOUVER LAKE AT FRUIT VLY RD AND 78TH ST EAST TO HAZEL DELL...78TH ST AND HWY 99...AND POSSIBLY EAST TOWARD ANDRESEN ROAD. ABOUT 200 TREES DOWN WITH 12 TO 50 INCH DIAMETER...INCLUDING ABOUT 6 TREES IN EXCESS OF 30 INCHES. 12 HOMES WITH MAINLY ROOF DAMAGE. 4 POWER POLES DOWN. SEMI-TRUCK TURNED OVER.
TREE DAMAGE. POWER LINES DOWN AND TRANSFORMER BLOWN IN HAZEL DELL. POWER FOR ABOUT 2500 CUSTOMERS IN THE AREA IS OUT.
TORNADO DESTROYED A PATIO BUILDING ON A FARM. IT LIFTED THE ROOF UP 100 FEET IN THE AIR AND DEPOSITED IT 200 YARDS DOWNSTREAM IN A FIELD.
TORNADO SPOTTED SOUTH OF HOCKINSON HIGH SCHOOL AND JUST WEST OF 172ND AVENUE
TORNADO SPOTTED SOUTH OF HOCKINSON HIGH SCHOOL AND JUST WEST OF 172ND AVENUE
LARGE HAIL REPORTED IN CAPE HORN AREA. CALLER INDICATED HAIL WAS THE SIZE OF PAINT BALL BALLS.
TREE ON ROADWAY.
POWER LINES DOWN.
1 MI FROM CONFLUENCE OF LEWIS AND COLUMBIA RIVERS. TREE TOP 12 INCHES IN DIAMETER WAS SNAPPED OFF.
TREE ON ROADWAY.
POWER LINES DOWN DEBRIS ON ROAD.
TREE STRUCK BY LIGHTNING FELL OVER ON ROAD BLOCKING TRAFFIC.
TREE BLOCKING ROADWAY.
DEBRIS IN HIGHWAY.
LARGE STONES...ALMOST SMALL WALNUT SIZED...CONTINUED FOR SEVERAL MINUTES. NO ACCUMULATION.
